entries.title: Python: Create a Box in OBJ
entries.content:
Create a geometry container at the object level:
hou.node('/obj').createNode('geo', 'my_box')

entries.title: Python: Set Float Parameter
entries.content:
Set the uniform scale of a box SOP:
node = hou.node('/obj/geo1/box1')
node.parm('scale').set(2.5)

entries.title: Python: Get World Space Position
entries.content:
Get the world space transform of a node:
world_m = hou.node('/obj/geo1').worldTransform()
pos = world_m.extractTranslation()

entries.title: Python: Connect Two Nodes
entries.content:
Connect the output of 'box1' to the first input of 'null1':
box = hou.node('/obj/geo1/box1')
null = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1')
null.setInput(0, box)

entries.title: Python: List Selected Nodes
entries.content:
Get a list of all currently selected nodes in the network editor:
selected = hou.selectedNodes()

entries.title: Python: Create SOP Wrangle & Set VEX
entries.content:
Create an attribute wrangle and set its code:
wrangle = hou.node('/obj/geo1').createNode('attribwrangle')
wrangle.parm('snippet').set('@P.y += 1;')

entries.title: Python: Iterate over points in geometry
entries.content:
Access geometry and print point positions:
geo = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry()
for pt in geo.points():
    print(pt.position())

entries.title: Python: Create Float Attribute
entries.content:
Add a new point attribute using Python:
geo = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry()
geo.addAttrib(hou.attribType.Point, 'my_attr', 1.0)

entries.title: Python: Set String Parameter
entries.content:
Update a file path on a File SOP:
hou.node('/obj/geo1/file1').parm('file').set('C:/data/mesh.obj')

entries.title: Python: Press Button Programmatically
entries.content:
Click the 'Reload' button on a File SOP:
hou.node('/obj/geo1/file1').parm('reload').pressButton()

entries.title: Python: Get children with specific type
entries.content:
Find all transform nodes in the current context:
transforms = [n for n in hou.node('/obj').children() if n.type().name() == 'xform']

entries.title: Python: Change Node Color
entries.content:
Set the node background color in the UI:
hou.node('/obj/geo1').setColor(hou.Color((1.0, 0.5, 0.0)))

entries.title: Python: Toggle Display Flag
entries.content:
Set the display flag on a SOP node:
hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').setDisplayFlag(True)

entries.title: Python: Save Scene reliably
entries.content:
Save the current .hip file:
hou.hipFile.save('C:/project/scene_v01.hip')

entries.title: Python: Create a Subnet and move nodes inside
entries.content:
Group nodes into a subnet:
parent = hou.node('/obj/geo1')
subnet = parent.createNode('subnet', 'my_group')
hou.moveNodesTo([parent.node('box1'), parent.node('sphere1')], subnet)

entries.title: Python: Access HDA Parameter Definition
entries.content:
Get the default value of a parameter from an HDA definition:
definition = hou.nodeType(hou.sopNodeTypeCategory(), 'my_hda').definition()
print(definition.parmTemplate('my_parm').defaultValue())

entries.title: Python: Set Animation Keyframe
entries.content:
Animate a parameter over time:
parm = hou.node('/obj/geo1/box1').parm('ty')
key = hou.Keyframe()
key.setFrame(1)
key.setValue(0)
parm.setKeyframe(key)
key.setFrame(24)
key.setValue(10)
parm.setKeyframe(key)

entries.title: Python: Layout Nodes in UI
entries.content:
Auto-arrange nodes in the network editor:
hou.node('/obj/geo1').layoutChildren()

entries.title: Python: Add custom user data to node
entries.content:
Store persistent JSON data inside a node:
node = hou.node('/obj/geo1')
node.setUserData('my_task_id', '12345')

entries.title: Python: Get Point Attribute Value
entries.content:
Read the Cd attribute of point 0:
geo = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry()
val = geo.point(0).attribValue('Cd')

entries.title: Python: Find node by path part
entries.content:
Search for nodes containing 'OUT' in their name:
outputs = [n for n in hou.node('/').allSubChildren() if 'OUT' in n.name()]

entries.title: Python: Create Merge SOP for list of nodes
entries.content:
Automatically merge multiple selected nodes:
parent = hou.selectedNodes()[0].parent()
merge = parent.createNode('merge')
for i, n in enumerate(hou.selectedNodes()):
    merge.setInput(i, n)

entries.title: Python: Get Parameter Expression
entries.content:
Check if a parameter has an expression:
parm = hou.node('/obj/geo1/box1').parm('tx')
if parm.expression():
    print(f'Expression: {parm.expression()}')

entries.title: Python: Change Render Flag (ROP)
entries.content:
Set the render node for a geometry object:
hou.node('/obj/geo1').parm('render_node').set('/out/mantra1')

entries.title: Python: Message Box Dialog
entries.content:
Show a popup message to the user:
hou.ui.displayMessage('Task completed successfully!')

entries.title: Python: Select Points in Geometry (Masking)
entries.content:
Find indices of points with Cd.r > 0.5:
geo = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry()
ids = [p.number() for p in geo.points() if p.attribValue('Cd')[0] > 0.5]

entries.title: Python: Create Null at bottom of chain
entries.content:
Append an OUT null to the selected node:
sel = hou.selectedNodes()[0]
out = sel.parent().createNode('null', f'OUT_{sel.name()}')
out.setInput(0, sel)
out.setDisplayFlag(True)

entries.title: Python: Get Scene Frame Range
entries.content:
Access FPS and time settings:
start, end = hou.playbar.frameRange()
fps = hou.fps()

entries.title: Python: Set Vector Parameter from List
entries.content:
Set color RGB directly:
hou.node('/obj/geo1/color1').parmTuple('color').set((1, 0, 0))

entries.title: Python: Create Ramp Parameter definition
entries.content:
Define a color ramp in Python:
ramp = hou.Ramp((hou.rampBasis.Linear, hou.rampBasis.Linear), (0, 1), ((1,0,0), (0,0,1)))
hou.node('/obj/geo1/attribwrangle1').parm('my_ramp').set(ramp)

entries.title: Python: Export Geometry to File
entries.content:
Save current SOP geometry to disk manually:
geo = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry()
geo.saveToFile('C:/temp/export.bgeo.sc')

entries.title: Python: Read Prim Intrinsics
entries.content:
Get the area of each primitive:
geo = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry()
for prim in geo.prims():
    print(f'Area: {prim.intrinsicValue('measuredarea')}')

entries.title: Python: Create For-Each Loop
Python: Check for Node Errors
Python: Create Global Variable
entries.content:
Set a project-level variable:
hou.hscript('set -g MYVAR = 50.0')

entries.title: Python: Run HScript Command
entries.content:
Execute old hscript commands safely:
output = hou.hscript('opls /obj')[0]

entries.title: Python: Get Currently Viewing Network Pane
entries.content:
Access the network editor tab:
pane = hou.ui.paneTabOfType(hou.paneTabType.NetworkEditor)

entries.title: Python: Set Viewport Camera
entries.content:
Point the scene view to a camera:
view = hou.ui.paneTabOfType(hou.paneTabType.SceneViewer)
view.curViewport().setCamera(hou.node('/obj/cam1'))

entries.title: Python: Batch Rename Nodes
entries.content:
Add a prefix to all selected nodes:
prefix = 'vfx_'
for n in hou.selectedNodes():
    n.setName(prefix + n.name(), unique_name=True)

entries.title: Python: Copy Node to Clipboard
entries.content:
Copy selected nodes for pasting elsewhere:
hou.copyNodesToClipboard(hou.selectedNodes())

entries.title: Python: Check if HDA is Locked
entries.content:
Check editing permissions:
node = hou.node('/obj/my_hda_1')
if node.isLocked():
    print('Node is locked/managed by HDA definition')

entries.title: Python: Unlock HDA Instance
entries.content:
Allow manual changes inside an HDA:
hou.node('/obj/my_hda_1').allowEditingOfContents()

entries.title: Python: Get Node Input Name
entries.content:
Read the label for a node input slot:
labels = hou.node('/obj/geo1/merge1').inputNames()
print(labels[0])

entries.title: Python: Create File Cache
entries.content:
Setup a filecache node for bgeo.sc at local path:
cache = hou.node('/obj/geo1').createNode('filecache')
cache.parm('file').set('$HIP/geo/cache_$F.bgeo.sc')

entries.title: Python: Select Points by Vertex count
entries.content:
Check connectivity (e.g. isolated points):
geo = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry()
bad = [p for p in geo.points() if len(p.prims()) == 0]

entries.title: Python: Find Object Merge Source
entries.content:
Trace back where an Object Merge is looking:
src = hou.node('/obj/geo_dest/merge_node').parm('objpath1').eval()

entries.title: Python: Change Desktop Layout
entries.content:
Switch to 'Build' desktop:
hou.ui.setDesktop('Build')

entries.title: Python: Get Point Attribute Type
entries.content:
Check if an attribute is a float array or vector:
attr = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry().findPointAttrib('Cd')
print(attr.dataType())

entries.title: Python: Cook Node Sync
entries.content:
Force a node to update immediately:
hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry()

entries.title: Python: Create Stick Transform
entries.content:
Set a node as child of another in OBJ:
child = hou.node('/obj/geo_child')
parent = hou.node('/obj/geo_parent')
child.setInput(0, parent)

entries.title: Python: Python Panel Popup
entries.content:
Open a floating Python panel by name:
hou.ui.curDesktop().createFloatingPane(hou.paneTabType.PythonPanel)

entries.title: Python: List available HDA definitions
entries.content:
Find all definitions in an .otl file:
defs = hou.hda.definitionsInFile('C:/project/my_lib.otl')

entries.title: Python: Clear All Node Flags
Python: Create Keyframe Interpolation
entries.content:
Set ease-in/ease-out on a key frame:
key = hou.Keyframe(1.0, 10)
key.setExpression('ease()', hou.exprLanguage.Hscript)

entries.title: Python: Delete all nodes in a network
Python: Create Comment on node
entries.content:
Add a stickynote comment above a node:
node = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1')
node.setComment('DO NOT DELETE - Used for export')

entries.title: Python: Create Camera from View
entries.content:
Create a camera matching the current viewport:
viewer = hou.ui.paneTabOfType(hou.paneTabType.SceneViewer)
viewer.saveViewToCamera()

entries.title: Python: Get Bounding Box Area
entries.content:
Calculate volume of the bbox:
box = hou.node('/obj/geo1/null1').geometry().boundingBox()
print(box.size().x() * box.size().y() * box.size().z())

entries.title: Python: Identify VEX Errors
entries.content:
Check if a wrangle is failing due to syntax:
wrangle = hou.node('/obj/geo1/attribwrangle1')
if wrangle.errors():
    print(f'VEX Syntax Error: {wrangle.errors()}')

entries.title: Python: Create Node via Alias/Internal Name
entries.content:
Always use internal name, not label:
hou.node('/obj/geo1').createNode('xform', 'my_transform')

entries.title: Python: Select Nodes by Color
entries.content:
Find all nodes marked red:
red_nodes = [n for n in hou.node('/obj').allSubChildren() if n.color().rgb() == (1,0,0)]

entries.title: Python: Check for User Interrupt
entries.content:
Abort a long Python loop if ESC is pressed:
with hou.InterruptableOperation('Running task...', open_interrupt_dialog=True) as operation:
    for i in range(1000):
        operation.updateProgress(i/1000)
        # do work

entries.title: Python: Create Python SOP Example
entries.content:
Setup a Python SOP with built-in code:
node = hou.node('/obj/geo1').createNode('python')
node.parm('python').set('geo = hou.pwd().geometry()\ngeo.addAttrib(hou.attribType.Global, "done", 1)')

entries.title: Python: Get Node by UUID
entries.content:
Retrieve a node using its unique session ID:
uuid = node.sessionId()
hou.nodeBySessionId(uuid)

entries.title: Python: Set Global FPS
entries.content:
Change scene playback speed:
hou.setFps(30.0)

entries.title: Python: List all ROPs in the scene
entries.content:
Find render drivers across all contexts:
rops = [n for n in hou.node('/').allSubChildren() if isinstance(n, hou.RopNode)]

entries.title: Python: Check if Geometry has valid VDB
entries.content:
Verify VDB primitive existence:
geo = hou.node('/obj/geo1/vdbnode').geometry()
vdbs = [p for p in geo.prims() if isinstance(p, hou.VDB)]

entries.title: Python: Open File Browser UI
entries.content:
Ask the user to pick an image:
path = hou.ui.selectFile(title='Pick Texture', pattern='*.jpg,*.png')

entries.title: Python: Create Take
entries.content:
Add a new scene variation:
take = hou.takes.createTake('v01_render')

entries.title: Python: Toggle Snap Settings
entries.content:
Change viewport snapping via Python:
hou.hscript('viewsnap -g on')

entries.title: Python: Identify Node Inputs count
Python: Create Group SOP and set group type
entries.content:
Setup a group node for primitives:
grp = hou.node('/obj/geo1').createNode('groupcreate')
grp.parm('groupmode').set('prim') # Primitive mode

entries.title: Python: Trigger Shelf Tool by ID
entries.content:
Run a standard Houdini shelf tool:
hou.shelves.tools()['vfx_box_generator'].retrace()

entries.title: Python: Access Global Scene Metadata
entries.content:
Get the file path and local OS info:
print(hou.hipFile.path())

entries.title: Python: Batch Toggle Ghost Mode
Python: Add custom float slider UI to node
entries.content:
Dynamically add a slider to any node:
grp = node.parmTemplateGroup()
temp = hou.FloatParmTemplate('my_slider', 'Strength', 1, (0.0,), 0.0, 1.0)
grp.append(temp)
node.setParmTemplateGroup(grp)

entries.title: Python: Create Null Proxy at OBJ from SOP
entries.content:
Create a placeholder object level link:
obj = hou.node('/obj').createNode('geo')
obj_merge = obj.createNode('object_merge')
obj_merge.parm('objpath1').set('/obj/geo_source/OUT_node')

entries.title: Python: Check for Duplicate Node Names
entries.content:
Verify name uniqueness within a context:
names = [n.name() for n in hou.node('/obj/geo1').children()]
if len(names) != len(set(names)):
    print('Duplicates detected')

entries.title: Python: Set Viewport Render Mode
entries.content:
Switch to wireframe mode:
viewer = hou.ui.paneTabOfType(hou.paneTabType.SceneViewer)
viewer.curViewport().viewPortDisplayModel().setShadingMode(hou.shadingMode.Wireframe)

entries.title: Python: Access Active Layer (USD/LOP)
entries.content:
Get the working USD layer:
lop = hou.node('/stage/layer1')
layer = lop.editableLayer()

entries.title: Python: Create New Desktop
entries.content:
Generate a custom workspace layout:
hou.ui.createDesktop('HoudiniMind_VFX')

entries.title: Python: Get User Preference for Dir
entries.content:
Read global setting for project path:
print(hou.getenv('JOB'))

entries.title: Python: Create Null in LOP layer
entries.content:
Workflow for USDP: 
hou.node('/stage').createNode('null')

entries.title: Python: Check if Point has any neighbors
entries.content:
Find isolated points:
geo = node.geometry()
if len(geo.point(0).neighbours()) == 0:
    print('Point is isolated')

entries.title: Python: Set Background Image for viewport
entries.content:
Add a reference image to the backend:
hou.hscript('viewbackground -i reference.jpg obj/cam1')

entries.title: Python: Force Geometry Cache Refresh
entries.content:
Clear memory and re-cook scene:
hou.hscript('oppurge')

entries.title: Python: Create Camera path animation with Python
entries.content:
Move camera along X axis over frame range:
cam = hou.node('/obj/cam1')
for f in range(1, 101):
    cam.parm('tx').setAtFrame(f * 0.1, f)

entries.title: Python: Check for Invalid Attributes
entries.content:
Detect null/invalid floats in a custom attribute:
geo = node.geometry()
bad = [p for p in geo.points() if p.attribValue('my_attr') > 1e10]

entries.title: Python: Set User UI Theme
entries.content:
Switch to dark mode:
hou.ui.setUIColorValue(hou.uiColor.MenuBG, hou.Color(0.1, 0.1, 0.1))

entries.title: Python: List all VEX includes accessible
entries.content:
Find where wrangle includes are being searched:
print(hou.getenv('HOUDINI_VEX_PATH'))

entries.title: Python: Create Keyframe Interpolation Ease In
entries.content:
k = hou.Keyframe(1, 0)
k.setExpression('easein()', hou.exprLanguage.Hscript)
node.parm('tx').setKeyframe(k)

entries.title: Python: Add Points to group by volume mask
Python: Lock specific parameters from UI editing
entries.content:
Prevent changes to some values:
hou.node('/obj/geo1/box1').parm('scale').lock(True)

entries.title: Python: Create Proxy Geometry node
entries.content:
Use Switch SOP to swap heavy/light versions:
switch = parent.createNode('switch', 'LOD_Control')
switch.setInput(0, heavy_geo)
switch.setInput(1, light_geo)

entries.title: Python: Check if current frame is first frame
Python: List all available Sop types
entries.content:
Get all node names for creation:
print([t.name() for t in hou.sopNodeTypeCategory().nodeTypes().values()])

entries.title: Python: Set multiple parameters at once
entries.content:
Faster than multiple .set() calls:
node.setParms({'sizex': 10, 'sizey': 20, 'sizez': 5})

entries.title: Python: Set Color attribute per-point randomly
entries.content:
Native python color assignment (slow for many points!):
import random
geo = node.geometry()
for p in geo.points():
    p.setAttribValue('Cd', (random.random(), 0.1, 0.1))

entries.title: Python: Create Script Button Callback
entries.content:
Define what happens when a button is clicked:
hou.node('/obj/geo1/attribwrangle1').parm('python_btn').set('hou.ui.displayMessage("Hi")')

entries.title: Python: Get Node Creation Date
entries.content:
Check when a node was built:
import datetime
time = node.modificationTime()
print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(time))
